subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 737111207/240511380 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (Florida tech) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 737111207/240511380 at 09:06:42.50 UT on 11 May 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."
